Container.Name: Grained
Container.Overview: Self-hosted film photography archive. Upload rolls from lab scan zip files, organise by film stock, format, and tags, browse in a full-screen lightbox, rotate and annotate frames, and share your archive with others.[br][br]Supports JPEG, PNG, TIFF, HEIC, and WebP. Thumbnails are generated automatically on upload. Optional password protection.
Container.Description: Self-hosted film photography archive. Upload rolls from lab scan zip files, organise by film stock, format, and tags, browse in a full-screen lightbox, rotate and annotate frames, and share your archive with others. Supports JPEG, PNG, TIFF, HEIC, and WebP. Thumbnails are generated automatically on upload. Optional password protection.

Config.Name: Host Port
Config.Description: Port the web interface will be available on.

Config.Name: Data Path
Config.Description: Where Grained stores its database and uploaded photos. Back this up.

Config.Name: Auth Password
Config.Description: Password to protect the app. Leave empty to disable authentication.

Config.Name: Session Secret
Config.Description: Random secret used to sign session tokens. Required if Auth Password is set. Generate one with: openssl rand -hex 32
